summary: Iteration 3: Validated Scene 6 'Şef'in Sınavı' (Boss) on top of existing 5-scene flow. Backend pytest extended (11/11 pass) to assert scene_6 persistence (84/90), total recompute to 120/126, and teacher_stats now includes scene_6 key. E2E Playwright pre-seeded scenes 1-5 via API then drove all 15 Boss questions through the 3-step flow (Tespit → Tür → Gerekçe → Feedback → Next). Achieved perfect 90/90 in Scene 6, grand total 126/126 (100%). GameSummary shows 6 rows including '6. Şef'in Sınavı (Boss)'. Teacher Dashboard table now has 11 columns (S1..S6) and the scene-card grid shows 6 cards including 'Boss · Şef'. Landing shows '6 sahnelik'. No critical issues found.

issues: Hero copy still says 'niteleme, işaret ve sayı sıfatlarıyla dolu' — should be expanded to mention soru/belgisiz/boss for accuracy now that 6 scenes exist (cosmetic only).

action_items: Optional: refresh Landing hero subtitle to mention all 5 adjective types + Boss (purely cosmetic).
Optional: add data-testid to TeacherDashboard scene-cards (carry-over from iter 2).
critical_code_review_comments: Scene6Boss scoreJustification: with hasKeyword=true and 5<=len<10, the function returns 1 (falls through to last branch) instead of giving keyword credit. Edge case but minor — keyword-only short answers (e.g. 'niteleme.' = 9 chars) score 1, not 3. Spec says +3 requires keyword AND length>=10, so behavior matches spec, just worth documenting.

Scene6Boss.nextQuestion uses `const finalResults = results;` at the last question, which captures state BEFORE the latest setResults. In practice it works because submit() also sets state and React re-renders before nextQuestion fires (user must click Next). Verified end-to-end produces correct 90/90, so no functional bug, but a useReducer/useRef pattern would be more defensive.

Word matching is case-sensitive equality (cleaned word === q.correctAdj). Works because gameContent.js uses sentence-cased forms ('Sıcak', 'Bu', 'Şu', 'O', 'Üç'...). Future-proofing: lowercase-compare both sides if any sentence lists the adj at non-initial position.
SceneUpdate.scene comment in server.py still says scene_1/2/3 — now accepts scene_1..scene_6; cosmetic.
Server still uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); migrate to lifespan handler (carry-over).
seed_data_creation: TEST_E2E_S6 (class TEST_6C) session 0b294830-36e7-4d7f-89b6-c8d3cf9f9378 — pre-seeded scenes 1-5 via API, then completed Scene 6 through UI for perfect 126/126.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 scenes verified end-to-end. Pattern for fast Scene-6-only E2E: (1) POST /api/sessions, (2) loop PUT /api/sessions/{id}/scene for scene_1..scene_5 with [9/9, 4/4, 8/8, 8/8, 7/7], (3) navigate /oyun/{id} — Game.jsx auto-jumps to sceneIndex=5 (Scene6Boss). Scene 6 testids per question i in 0..14: scene6-q{i}-word-{Word}, scene6-q{i}-type-{niteleme|isaret|sayi|soru|belgisiz}, scene6-q{i}-justification, scene6-q{i}-submit, scene6-q{i}-next, scene6-q{i}-feedback. Word casing matters — see SCENE_6.questions in /app/frontend/src/lib/gameContent.js. Perfect Boss = 15 questions × 6 = 90; with all prior scenes 36, grand total 126.
